title: Specmatic Contract
description: Represents an API contract in the Specmatic platform, derived from an API specification file.

specificationFormat.description: Format of the API specification that defines the contract.

specificationVersion.description: Version of the specification format (e.g., '3.1.0' for OpenAPI).

specificationUrl.description: URL or file path to the raw specification file.

backwardCompatible.description: Whether the current version is backward compatible with the previous version.

coveragePercent.description: Percentage of specification paths/operations covered by tests.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the contract was first registered.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last contract update.
